article_title: Bylaw 14745 — Housing Agreement (6263 abd 6337 Cassie Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Locks Non-Market Rental Housing Agreement at 6263–6337 Cassie Avenue into Title
briefs.summary: Burnaby adopted Bylaw 14745 on May 27, 2025, authorising a legally binding housing agreement with Willingdon Avenue Investments Ltd. that restricts a 38-storey tower's non-market rental units to affordable tenancy conditions registered on title.
briefs.action_required: If you own or manage rental property in Burnaby, review how non-market housing covenants on title may affect financing, resale, or tenancy obligations.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Tenant
